Package com.koralix.commons.value

Class AtomicWrapperValue<T>

java.lang.Object
com.koralix.commons.value.AtomicWrapperValue<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the value type
All Implemented Interfaces:
Value<T>
public class AtomicWrapperValue<T> extends Object implements Value<T>
An atomic WrapperValue variant.

    • compareAndSet

      public boolean compareAndSet(T expected, T newValue)
      Atomically sets the value to the given updated value if the current value == the expected value.
      Parameters:
      expected - the expected value
      newValue - the new value
      Returns:
      true if successful

    • updateAndGet

      public T updateAndGet(UnaryOperator<T> mapper)
      Atomically updates the value with the results of applying the given function, returning the old value.
      Parameters:
      mapper - the function
      Returns:
      the old value
